parameters.pythonCode:
# Loop over input items and add a new field called 'myNewField' to the JSON of each one
output = []

for i, item in enumerate(items):
  data = item["json"]
  
  transcript = data.get("transcript", "")
  url = data.get("url", "")
  description = data.get("description", "")
  title = data.get("title", "")

  # Combine into one string (space-separated)
  combined = f"##Video {i+1}\n\n###Title: {title}\n\n ####Video url: {url} \n\n ###Description: {description} \n\n ####Transcript: {transcript}"

  # Append new dictionary with only one field
  output.append({
          "Info source": combined
  })

return output

options.systemMessage:
=Change ALL the input into html with the following format: ALL the input should be in the html. If the tools are presented multiple times, merge the different entries into one. Don't forgot anything from the input. Sign with "By Ogilvy AI.Lab". The response should be in English. Title is "Your weekly shot of tech news". Just return the html page. Don't add anything. Follow the output format: Example:

Your weekly shot of tech news

#1 MIDJOURNEY V7 ALPHA: Personnalisation, rapidité et qualité redéfinies!

La V7 Alpha est là, avec des prompts texte et image améliorés, une qualité d'image époustouflante et une cohérence inégalée. Personnalisation activée par défaut : adaptez le modèle à vos goûts en quelques minutes.Le "Draft Mode" révolutionne l'itération : créez 10 fois plus vite!

Key Features:

  • • Prompts texte et image améliorés
  • • Personnalisation activée par défaut
  • • Mode Draft pour génération rapide
  • • Mode conversationnel et vocal

Particularities:

Unique features with make the tool valuable

Comparison with other tools:

Par rapport à DALL·E ou Stable Diffusion, Midjourney V7 offre une meilleure cohérence visuelle et une personnalisation plus intuitive.

Testez le ici

#2 KLING 2.0 révolutionne la création vidéo avec l’IA

Kuaishou frappe fort avec Kling 2.0, une IA générative pour vidéos et images. La "MasterEdition" offre une compréhension sémantique et un contrôle utilisateur améliorés.

Key Features:

  • • Génération vidéo et image haute qualité
  • • Édition multimodale avancée
  • • Contrôle utilisateur précis
  • • Compréhension sémantique améliorée

Particularities:

Unique features with make the tool valuable

Comparison with other tools:

Contrairement à Runway ou Pika Labs, Kling 2.0 se distingue par son outil d’édition multimodal et sa flexibilité dans le montage vidéo.

Testez le ici

By Ogilvy AI.Lab

=You are an AI news summarization assistant.
Your task is to summarize the information regarding new AI tools contained in the input which can be articles or video transcripts.
List only the new tools discussed which are released and available for testing (no article paper, no robot demo, no coding model, no math model, ...) and related to the creative workflow (Image and video models, agents). 
The input can contain multiple AI tools.


**Information to retrieve:**
Name of the tool
Description (what it does, who it’s for, and why it’s important)
Key features (bullet points)
Particularities of the model disscussed in the source: (bullet points) (can be open source, less censored, cheap, ...)
Comparison with other models or previous version of the same tool disscussed in the source: (bullet points)
Link to access or learn more (official website, blog post, or announcement link)


**Output format:**


**Name of Tool**
Description: ...
Key features:
- feature 1
- feature 2 
Particularities: 
- Particularity 1 
- Particularity 2
Comparison:
- Comparison 1
- Comparison 2
Link: ...
______ (part of the output, separator between tools, put it even if there is only one tool)


**Example:**


**Ovi**
Ovi is an open-source AI video generator that creates videos with built-in audio, including dialogue and sound effects. It's designed for creators looking for a free and customizable tool for generating videos.

Key Features:
• Generates videos from text prompts (Text-to-Video).
• Converts images to videos with audio (Image-to-Video).
• Supports multiple characters and languages.
• Includes sound effects and singing capabilities.
Particularities:
Completely open-source and free to use. Can run locally on lower VRAM systems using ComfyUI, allowing broader accessibility.

Comparison with other tools:
Quality is not as high as some closed-source models like V3 and Sora 2, but Ovi is the first of its kind to be open-source. Has capabilities like generating videos from realistic images which previous models do not allow.

Link: ...
______


**Rules:**
- Don’t add any information not contained in the input source.
- Please, don't put any double quotes in your output. 
- Please RESPECT the output format given. 
- Complete every field of the output format thoroughly, using all information from the input.
- be exhaustive relating the information contained in the source

Input:

{{ $json['Info source'] }}

parameters.pythonCode:
input = _input.first().json.output 
clean_output = input.replace("\n","")
clean_output = clean_output.replace("```html","")
clean_output = clean_output.replace("```","")

return {"html_page": clean_output}

parameters.text: Merge entries regarding the same tools

options.systemMessage:
=You are an AI news researcher.
You'll be given series on snippet on new AI tools. Your role is to merge the entries for the same tool into one which combined all the information of the different entries. If there is multiple tier of the same tools (for exemple pro version), merge them together in a snippet describing both version. 

Leave the other tools' descriptions untouched. 

**Important**: Return ALL the tools mentionned in the input.

**Output format:**

**Name of Tool**
Description: ...
Key features:
- feature 1
- feature 2 
Particularities: 
- Particularity 1 
- Particularity 2
Comparison:
- Comparison 1
- Comparison 2
Link: ...
______ (separator between tools)

**Example:**

**Ovi**
Ovi is an open-source AI video generator that creates videos with built-in audio, including dialogue and sound effects. It's designed for creators looking for a free and customizable tool for generating videos.

Key Features:
• Generates videos from text prompts (Text-to-Video).
• Converts images to videos with audio (Image-to-Video).
• Supports multiple characters and languages.
• Includes sound effects and singing capabilities.
Particularities:
Completely open-source and free to use. Can run locally on lower VRAM systems using ComfyUI, allowing broader accessibility.

Comparison with other tools:
Quality is not as high as some closed-source models like V3 and Sora 2, but Ovi is the first of its kind to be open-source. Has capabilities like generating videos from realistic images which previous models do not allow.

Link: ...
______


**Rules:**
- return ALL the tools mentionned in the input (untouched or merged version)
- Don’t add any information not contained in the input source.

- Complete every field of the output format thoroughly, using all information from the input.


Input:

{{ $json.combined_sources }}

parameters.pythonCode:
from datetime import datetime

# Example input
input_date = _input.first().json.Date

# Parse the date string
parsed_date = datetime.strptime(input_date, "%B %d, %Y")

# Convert to ISO 8601 UTC format
iso_date = parsed_date.isoformat() + "Z"

return {"todaydate": iso_date}

parameters.text:
Is there new substantial info in the new description ? if no, return "",
if yes, merge the old and new description

options.systemMessage:
=You are an AI news researcher. You'll be given two descriptions (one new and one old) on the same AI tools. Your role is to identify if there is any substential information like new updates, new features discovered added by the new descrition compared to the old description.

**Rules:**

If there is no new substential information, return empty quotes ("")
else merge the two descritpions of the tool. 
If there is conflicting information, use the details from the newest description.
return also **new addtions section**: this section explained the difference between old and new tool description.



**Output format:** (if there is new information)

**Name of Tool**
Description: ...
Key features:
- feature 1
- feature 2 
Particularities: 
- Particularity 1 
- Particularity 2
Comparison:
- Comparison 1
- Comparison 2
Link: ...

new addtions section: ...

**Example:**

**Ovi**
Ovi is an open-source AI video generator that creates videos with built-in audio, including dialogue and sound effects. It's designed for creators looking for a free and customizable tool for generating videos.

Key Features:
• Generates videos from text prompts (Text-to-Video).
• Converts images to videos with audio (Image-to-Video).
• Supports multiple characters and languages.
• Includes sound effects and singing capabilities.
Particularities:
Completely open-source and free to use. Can run locally on lower VRAM systems using ComfyUI, allowing broader accessibility.

Comparison with other tools:
Quality is not as high as some closed-source models like V3 and Sora 2, but Ovi is the first of its kind to be open-source. Has capabilities like generating videos from realistic images which previous models do not allow.

Link: ...

Old description of the tool: 
"
{{ $json.value[0].toolDescription }}
"

New description of the tool
"
{{ $json.toolDescription }}
"

parameters.pythonCode:
# Loop over input items and add a new field called 'myNewField' to the JSON of each one
nb_docs = _input.first().json.data
date = _input.first().json.todaydate

tool_data = _input.all()[1:]

for i, item in enumerate(tool_data):
  item.json.id = 1 + i + int(nb_docs)
  item.json.toolDate = date
  
return _input.all()[1:]
